html:
Exclusive to:  

The Battle Helm is a wearable Armor item for the head slot in the Reign of Giants DLC and is exclusive to Wigfrid. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her Inventory and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 2 Rocks to craft.

It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to water resistance.

Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the Football Helmet and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Golden Helm skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
  • The Proof of Purchase Wildflower Helm skin is obtained by purchasing the Wigfrid Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Golden Helm
A golden helm fit for a golden warrior.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Winged Victory Collection
Winged Helm
A battle helm for a warrior whose head is comfortable in the clouds.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Moonbound Collection
Moonlight Diadem
A gleaming headdress for an enlightened mind.
Woven - Elegant
Parlor's Collection
Wrangler's Wide-Brim
Shield your eyes from the blazing sun as mind your beefalo heard.[sic]
Proof of Purchase
Wildflower Helm
These beautiful blooms have had to fight for survival in the unforgiving wilderness.

Tips

  • Wigfrid is allowed to give other players the Battle Helm and Battle Spear, making her a great asset to the team. However, she is the only one allowed to craft it.

Trivia

  • Willow's quote, "It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh..." is a reference to the fact that every character 's name starts with a W, even including Maxwell, which is in fact his stage name from better days; his real name is William Carter.
  • Initially, the Moonlight Diadem skin featured a star instead of Alter's symbol. It was changed presumably due to associations with the Star of David. [1]

  1. ↑ Tin Can on forums: A friend of mine [who is Jewish] pointed out that the star in Wigfrid's new helm skin [which is visible in her portrait] looks a bit too close to the Star of David and it made them uncomfortable. I suggest changing the shape of the star to be something more like these. both the portrait and skin for reference. note that the resemblance is more apparent in her portrait.

Exclusive to:
“Pretty fancy hat, that.”
–Wilson
“It's got a name scratched on the inside... "W", uh...”
–Willow
“Is strong helm for strong warrior!”
–Wolfgang
“I've never seen her take it off before...”
–Wendy
“DUMB HAT”
–WX-78
“Anachronistic drivel.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty snappy looking.”
–Woodie
“Well... it's no crown.”
–Maxwell
“The pöwer öf the unicörn is great.”
–Wigfrid
“Haha! It's way too big for us!”
–Webber
“I don't have the confidence to pull it off like she does.”
–Warly
“Pokey branch hat”
–Wormwood
“Surprisingly practical.”
–Winona
“I hope it fits over my horns.”
–Wortox
“Will wearing make me strong like Viking lady?”
–Wurt
“Maybe Pinetree Pioneers should start wearing helmets instead.”
–Walter
“It's not historically accurate, but I'll just keep that to myself.”
–Wanda
The Battle Helm is a wearable Armor item for the head slot in the Reign of Giants DLC and is exclusive to Wigfrid. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her Inventory and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 Gold Nuggets and 2 Rocks to craft.
It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to water resistance.
Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the Football Helmet and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Chiến Đấu là một vật phẩm Giáp có thể đeo được cho ô đầu trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants và chỉ có ở Wigfrid. Wigfrid bắt đầu trò chơi với nó trong Kho đồ của mình và là nhân vật duy nhất có thể chế tạo nó. Nó cần 2 Vàng Thỏi và 2 Đá để chế tạo.
title: Battle Helm/DST

It's way too big for us! |winona = Surprisingly practical. |warly = I don't have the confidence to pull it off like she does. |wortox = I hope it fits over my horns. |wormwood = Pokey branch hat |wurt = Will wearing make me strong like Viking lady? |walter = Maybe Pinetree Pioneers should start wearing helmets instead. |wanda = It's not historically accurate, but I'll just keep that to myself. |choose = wigfrid}} The '''Battle Helm''' is a wearable [[Armor]] item for the head slot in the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC and is exclusive to [[Wigfrid]]. Wigfrid starts the game with it in her [[Inventory]] and is the only character able to craft it. It requires 2 [[Gold Nugget]]s and 2 [[Rocks]] to craft. It absorbs 80% of incoming damage and provides a 20% bonus to [[Wetness|water resistance]]. Due to its stats and cheap recipe, the Battle Helm is a great alternative to the [[Football Helmet]] and will secure the head armor slot for a long time for Wigfrid players. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Golden Helm''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019. * The '''Proof of Purchase Wildflower Helm''' skin is obtained by purchasing the Wigfrid Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
